content:
FIX IVX AUTOMATIC DEPLOYMENT END TO END

Repo:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Current real problem:
GitHub HEAD is newer than production.
Production /health is old commit.
Render auto-deploy is not triggering.
Do not add features until this is fixed.

MISSION:
Make GitHub main → Render → production automatic and verified.

1. Audit current state

Return:
GITHUB_HEAD:
PRODUCTION_HEALTH_SHA:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_CONNECTED_REPO:
RENDER_CONNECTED_BRANCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY_ENABLED:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS:
WEBHOOK_STATUS:
DEPLOY_HOOK_STATUS:
MISSING_SECRETS:

2. Fix Render connection

If Render repo is wrong:
- Connect Render service to ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

If branch is wrong:
- Set branch to main

If auto-deploy is off:
- Enable autoDeployTrigger: commit

If deploy hook is missing:
- Create deploy hook
- Save hook URL securely
- Add Live Work button: Trigger Deploy Now

3. Fix GitHub Actions fallback

Create workflow:
.github/workflows/render-deploy.yml

Workflow must:
- run on push to main
- call Render deploy API
- wait for deployment
- verify /health
- fail if production SHA does not match GitHub SHA

Required secrets:
RENDER_API_KEY
RENDER_SERVICE_ID

If secrets are missing:
Return exactly:
MISSING_SECRET: RENDER_API_KEY
MISSING_SECRET: RENDER_SERVICE_ID

Do not fake deployment.

4. Force deploy now

Trigger deploy from latest GitHub HEAD.

Wait until Render status is live.

Return:
DEPLOY_STARTED:
DEPLOY_ID:
DEPLOY_STATUS:
DEPLOYED_SHA:
DEPLOY_LOGS:

5. Verify production

Test:
GET https://api.ivxholding.com/health
GET https://api.ivxholding.com/version
GET https://chat.ivxholding.com

Compare:
GitHub HEAD
Render deployed SHA
/health SHA
/version SHA

6. Final proof

Return only:

REPO:
BRANCH:
GITHUB_HEAD:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_SERVICE_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY_ENABLED:
WEBHOOK_STATUS:
GITHUB_ACTIONS_STATUS:
HEALTH_STATUS:
FRONTEND_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Rules:
COMPLETE only if:
GitHub HEAD = Render deployed SHA = /health SHA = /version SHA
and Render auto-deploy triggers automatically on push to main.

If not complete, return BLOCKED with the exact missing credential, webhook, repo connection, or Render error.
